name: Appendix Table
description: Displays SAC variables, filters or arbitrary metadata as a configurable, styleable and dynamic appendix table.

rows.description: JSON array with table rows. Each row is an object.

columns.description: JSON array with dynamic column definitions.

styleConfig.description: JSON style configuration for templates, column width mode, totals and table appearance.

customCss.description: Custom CSS injected into the widget shadow DOM.

rules.description: JSON array with conditional styling rules.

setRows.description: Sets table rows as JSON string.

setConfig.description: Sets table config as JSON string.

setColumns.description: Sets dynamic columns as JSON string.

setStyleConfig.description: Sets table style configuration as JSON string.

setRules.description: Sets conditional styling rules as JSON string.

parameters.name: rules
parameters.description: JSON array with conditional styling rules.

setData.description: Sets config, columns, styleConfig, customCss, rules and rows at once.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: JSON object with config, columns, styleConfig, customCss, rules and rows.
